name: Fortnite Profile
description: Shows a Fortnite Battle Royale profile and stats with an optional API key.
author: Akashsuu

defaults.descriptionTemplate:
**Account**
Name: `{fortnite_name}`
Account ID: `{account_id}`
Platform: `{platform}`
Window: `{time_window}`

**Battle Royale**
Wins: `{wins}`
Kills: `{kills}`
Matches: `{matches}`
K/D: `{kd}`
Win Rate: `{win_rate}`
Score: `{score}`

**Links**
Profile: {profile_link}
defaults.missingKeyMessage: Set a Fortnite API key in this node before using `{command}`.
defaults.notFoundMessage: No Fortnite profile found for `{query}`. The account may be private or the platform may be wrong.
